opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing leads in Boise are going directly to competitors with online booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture urgent plumbing requests instantly.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact means all lead data is untracked.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call is lost permanently with zero follow-up capability.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and follow up every inquiry.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: Only 76 reviews with a 4.2 rating suggests unresponded reviews hurting reputation growth.
opportunities.observation: Skipping owner responses signals low engagement, weakening trust for Boise customers comparing plumbers.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized Google review responses to boost credibility and improve local search ranking.
